title: Lokay
compiled_truth: Lokay is an external contact at [Bigfoot](companies/bigfoot). Over the corpus period (2000-12-04 to 2002-03-25), Lokay sent 25 and received 15 emails, totalling 40 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (20), [Arabtrader](people/arabtrader-aol) (1), [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (1), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (1).
